x-enumeration-literals.name: Personal Loan
x-enumeration-literals.description: A personal loan is an unsecured loan granted to individuals for personal use, such as medical expenses, travel, or home improvements, typically repaid in fixed installments.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Mortgage Loan
x-enumeration-literals.description: A mortgage loan is a long-term loan used to purchase or refinance real estate, where the property serves as collateral for the loan.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Auto Loan
x-enumeration-literals.description: An auto loan is a loan provided to finance the purchase of a vehicle, where the vehicle itself usually acts as collateral.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Business Loan
x-enumeration-literals.description: A business loan is a credit facility granted to businesses to finance operations, expansion, equipment purchases, or investments.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Education Loan
x-enumeration-literals.description: Education Loan (Student Loan) is a loan designed to finance educational expenses such as tuition fees, books, and living costs for students.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Line Loan
x-enumeration-literals.description: Credit Line Loan (Revolving Loan) is a revolving loan facility that allows borrowers to withdraw funds up to an approved limit and repay them flexibly.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Overdraft Loan
x-enumeration-literals.description: An overdraft loan allows customers to withdraw more money than the available balance in their account up to an approved limit.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Payday Loan
x-enumeration-literals.description: A payday loan is a short-term, high-interest loan designed to cover expenses until the borrower receives their next paycheck.
